title: How employers post a job
content: Employers can post a job in 4 steps: (1) Sign in with your business email account. (2) Choose worker category, job location, date/time, and budget. (3) Add job details and required skills. (4) Review and publish the job, then track applications from dashboard.

title: How workers apply for a job
content: Workers can apply in 4 steps: (1) Sign in with phone number and complete profile. (2) Browse jobs by category and location. (3) Open a job card, check pay and timing, and tap Apply. (4) Track application updates in your dashboard.

title: Supported job categories
content: Current categories include plumber, electrician, cook, driver, security guard, cleaner, carpenter, and painter.

title: Payment and payout policy
content: Workers are paid within 24 hours of confirmed job completion. Payout modes: UPI and bank transfer. Employers can view payment status in job details.

title: Worker verification process
content: Workers submit a government ID and skill proof document. Verification is completed in 12 to 24 hours. Verified workers are prioritized in search results.

title: Cancellation policy
content: Jobs can be canceled at least 2 hours before the job start time without penalty. Late cancellations may affect reliability scores.

title: Complaint and issue resolution
content: Users can report issues through chatbot support or email support@app.com. Typical resolution time is within 48 hours. Include job ID and a short description for faster help.

title: Registration rules
content: Employers register with business email. Workers register with mobile phone number. Both must verify OTP to activate account.

title: Job status checks
content: To check job status, users should provide job ID. Common statuses: posted, assigned, in_progress, completed, canceled.
